SOURCE: T-MSIS Inpatient Claims File (derived) 

VALUES: $ 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable as the sum of all MDCD_PD_AMT from the Inpatient (header) claims. The 
Center for Medicaid and CHIP Services (CMCS) at CMS has required redaction of this payment field for 
managed care claims due to the proprietary and confidential nature of this information. Therefore, 
when summing Medicaid expenditures using the claim files it is important to keep in mind that totals 
will include only
